nodes.label: Crisis Detection Fail-Safe Invariant
nodes.rationale: Crisis detection must default to treating the entry as a crisis if the LLM confirmation is unreachable or times out.

nodes.label: Prompts.go Storage Rule
nodes.rationale: LLM prompt strings must live exclusively in prompts.go, never inlined in other services or files.

nodes.label: Empathetic Therapy Mode
nodes.rationale: Provides real-time empathetic voice conversation with pre-loaded user journal context and 1-hour session limits.

nodes.label: Go Dependency Injection Pattern
nodes.rationale: All structural and service DI wiring is centralized in router.go for maintainability.

nodes.label: 3-Turn Conversation Cap
nodes.rationale: Caps follow-up conversations at 3 turns to control cost and keep user interaction bounded.

nodes.label: AI Context Window Compression
nodes.rationale: Combines weekly digests, monthly profiles, and pgvector semantic retrieval to keep AI context window under 8K tokens.

nodes.label: Apple Native Feature Threat
nodes.rationale: Apple Intelligence natively integrated with Voice Memos could make basic AI reflections obsolete, requiring a clinical/brand moat.

nodes.label: US-First Global GTM Strategy
nodes.rationale: Launching US-first captures higher willingness to pay and lower initial mental health stigma than India.

nodes.label: Consumer App Retention Valley
nodes.rationale: Journaling apps suffer ~92% abandonment; building habit formation mechanics is critical before scaling user acquisition.
